prompt: A luxurious cosmetic product advertisement featuring a single elegant glass jar with a shiny gold lid resting on a round, light-colored marble slab. The jar has gold text reading {argument name="brand name" default="LUMIÉRE"} and {argument name="product type" default="MOISTURE RICH CREAM"} with "AGING CARE*" below it. The background consists of soft, draped, shimmering champagne-colored silk fabric with delicate white flowers on the left. The lighting is warm, ethereal, and sun-drenched with soft bokeh. At the top center, elegant dark brown Japanese typography reads {argument name="main headline" default="肌に、静かな贅沢を。"} above a small decorative gold divider and the text {argument name="subheadline" default="高保湿×エイジングケア*"}. To the right of the jar, a thin gold circle contains Japanese text meaning 'With dense moisture, high-quality firmness and radiance'. At the bottom center is a dark rectangular call-to-action button with a thin gold border containing the text {argument name="button text" default="詳しく見る"} and a right-pointing chevron. In the bottom right corner, tiny fine print contains Japanese text meaning '*Care according to age'.

breakdown.creativeCore: Luxury Cosmetic Web Advertisement：Generates a high-end cosmetic product advertisement with elegant typography, a glowing background, and a call-to-action button.
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: luxury]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
